payload.policy_flag: Duration of 120 days exceeds 90-day short-term policy cap. VP exception approval workflow initiated.
payload.test_note: TC-001: Event 1 of 4. Single intake signal. Agent should assess LOW-MEDIUM risk. Intervention should NOT fire here.

payload.impact: Buffer collapses from 27 days to 13 days.
payload.test_note: TC-001: Event 2 of 4. Concerning but single signal, still recoverable. Agent should assess MEDIUM risk. Intervention should NOT fire here — impact medium, reversibility still manageable.

payload.impact: Processing clock paused. Combined with compressed buffer from event 2, start date now at measurable risk.
payload.test_note: TC-001: Event 3 of 4. Two corroborating signals now — timeline compressed AND processing suspended. Impact HIGH, reversibility PARTIAL. Intervention SHOULD fire here.

payload.decision: Human reviewed intervention at event 3 and initiated document submission
payload.outcome: Document submission initiated. Processing can resume upon receipt.
payload.test_note: TC-001: Event 4 of 4. Post-intervention resolution. Agent should assess risk as REDUCED — human acted correctly and the situation is recovering.

payload.impact: Processing suspended. 10-day window to submit document and resume processing.
payload.test_note: TC-002: Event 1 of 4. Agent should issue human_action_required req_001: submit document within 10 days. This ID will be tracked through the test.

payload.impact: 10-day submission window elapsed. Processing remains suspended.
payload.test_note: TC-002: Event 2 of 4. Deadline passed with no action. Agent should mark req_001 as MISSED and reference it in missed_prior_actions. This is the key assertion.

payload.impact: Second unresolved blocker. Assignment technically unauthorized. Payroll setup cannot proceed.
payload.test_note: TC-002: Event 3 of 4. Second missed action accumulating. Agent should issue new human_action_required req_002 for VP escalation. Both req_001 and req_002 should be in register as missed/active respectively.

payload.system_rule: Host payroll setup requires confirmed VP exception approval.
payload.impact: Payroll cannot start. Cascade from unresolved policy approval.
payload.test_note: TC-002: Event 4 of 4. Downstream cascade confirms prior inaction had consequences. Agent should reference both missed req_001 and the cascade from req_002 non-resolution. missed_prior_actions should contain req_001. supersedes or new req for payroll cascade.
